methodology.summary: Use this reference when creating a new agent or subagent, editing an existing agent, fixing or improving an agent, or adding functionality to an agent.
Use this reference when creating a new command, editing or updating an existing command, or fixing or improving a command.
Hooks are automated scripts that execute at specific lifecycle events (PreToolUse, PostToolUse, SessionStart, Stop, etc.
Build custom MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers in TypeScript or Python to expose internal APIs, databases, and services as typed tools that Claude agents can invoke directly.
Learn to build Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers that expose internal systems as typed, discoverable tools for Claude agents.
Reference catalog of 40+ popular MCP servers for Claude Code, organized by service category (marketing, analytics, project management, development, design, etc.
Convention for organizing documentation so both Claude Code and standalone agents (Agent SDK, subagents, autoheal) can discover and use the same context.
Complete guide to skill creation and management in Claude Code.
Reusable templates for implementing the three-tier context pyramid: CLAUDE.
